body.title: interpretive_edges: add ON DELETE CASCADE + orphan cleanup query
body.result: Migrations m027-m033: ON DELETE CASCADE on interpretive_edges.from_id + to_id + memory_blobs.memory_id; one-time orphan cleanup m031. Runs on next Igor restart. Committed d58b0993.
body.description: cortex.py schema lines 171-185: interpretive_edges FK to memories lacks ON DELETE CASCADE. When a memory is deleted, its 36K+ edges become dangling references slowing traversal. Fix: (1) ALTER TABLE interpretive_edges ADD CONSTRAINT fk_from FOREIGN KEY (from_id) REFERENCES memories(id) ON DELETE CASCADE; same for to_id. (2) Add one-time backfill: DELETE FROM interpretive_edges WHERE from_id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM memories) OR to_id NOT IN (SELECT id FROM memories). (3) Add periodic cleanup in cortex. DB finding from deep-audit Panel 1.
